arts.sum: The American defender is on a high ahead of Bayern bash after hometown Super Bowl win and he's out for a dream double

arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers' men have reached the knockouts for the first time since 2012/13

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Manchester City wants Bayern Munich target Florian Wirtz; Tom Bischof’s agent says youngster is convinced Bayern is best way forward; FC Barcelona and Liverpool looking to swap players?; and MORE!
arts.sum: If Bayern Munich truly wants Bournemouth center-back Dean Huijsen, it will have to fend off Manchester United and Real Madrid : In this episode of The Bundesliga Rundown, we’ll break down Bayern Munich ’s title chances and the fierce relegation battle at the bottom of the table.

arts.ttl: Union Berlin 25-26 Home Kit to Feature Hoops Design
Bayern Munich defender Josip Stanišić knows how dangerous Celtic can be
arts.sum: It was something that left a mark on the talented 24-year-old, who watched Bayern Munich’s senior team play a Champions League Group Stage game there back in 2017. Stanišić has yet to play a major role under Vincent Kompany as of yet, but he could hold a big key for the squad, given how strong he has looked this season in the brief appearances he has made.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Gunners given Harry Kane transfer verdict as bid for striker explained
arts.sum: Arsenal haven't played since their 2-0 loss to Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-finals and aren't due to play again until a trip to Leicester City on February 15, giving them a total of 10 days rest

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Celtic in the first leg of their Champions League play-off on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers eager for shot at “European royalty” with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: You look at him now, a world-class player, but he has changed his game a bit,” said Rodgers. Rodgers, however, is at least familiar with one big name — Bayern MUnich striker Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Serge Gnabry among Bayern Munich players eager to enjoy atmosphere of Celtic Park
arts.sum: Bayern Munich attacker Serge Gnabry has been sick over the last week, but the prospect of playing at Celtic Park in the Champions League has lifted the Germany international’s spirits a bit in recent days. Gnabry has never faced off with Celtic and while he knows his first job is to win the game, the 29-year-old is eager to soak in the electric atmosphere that awaits the Bavarians.
